metadata.position_exact: Finance Rotation Program - Novartis Pharma AG
metadata.job_summary: Novartis Pharma AG is recruiting for a structured 3-year Finance Rotation Program beginning September 2026. The permanent position offers hands-on experience across operational assignments, accounting & reporting, and business planning & analysis, supported by professional training and mentoring. Candidates should have a recent Master's degree in Finance/Accounting and prior professional finance or accounting experience.

research.company_mission: Discover new ways to improve and extend people's lives through science-based innovation
research.recent_news: $54.5 billion in net sales (2025, +8% growth); 40.1% core operating margin; 30+ potential high-value pipeline assets; strategic focus on cardiovascular-renal-metabolic, immunology, neuroscience, and oncology

resume.introduction: Finance analyst with FP&A and corporate reporting experience across business units. Transitioning from M&A advisory into corporate finance and financial planning. Available from May 2026.
auraia_bullets: Coordinated financial projects with legal, tax, and financial advisors across 7 transactions (EUR 5M-50M scope), managing stakeholder workflows and ensuring delivery of high-quality analytical outputs
Delivered financial analysis and reporting in a 3-person team environment, responsible for maintaining structured data systems and data quality standards while meeting competing deadlines
Built financial models including DCF analysis, valuation comparisons, and scenario planning; translated complex calculations into actionable insights for senior management decision-making
Managed cross-functional coordination across 10+ internal and external parties, demonstrating ability to synthesize complex information and support strategic decision-making
rc_bullets: Conducted financial analysis on acquisition opportunities, developing business cases across multiple sectors
Worked with divisional leadership to evaluate strategic opportunities and inform investment decisions
Screened 500+ targets and contributed to due diligence analysis supporting successful acquisitions
generali_bullets: Supported CFO and Head of Controlling on FP&A and strategic projects for the Swiss subsidiary (CHF 50M+ revenues)
Built automated dashboards in Excel and PowerBI to track KPIs; performed variance analysis on monthly P&L
Prepared Board presentations on financial performance; assisted in annual budget planning for 5 business units

extra_entries.title: McKinsey x Keyrock Business Case Finalist
extra_entries.sentence: Developed a quantitative model to forecast market events using statistical analysis

extra_entries.title: Personal Investment Portfolio Manager
extra_entries.sentence: Manages a diversified portfolio using options strategies, achieving +8% annualized returns

extra_entries.title: Founder & Developer, Screeny.ai
extra_entries.sentence: Built AI-driven analytical tool for financial analysis, adopted by 3 advisory firms

extra_entries.title: Founder, Second-Hand Luxury Business
extra_entries.sentence: Founded and managed luxury resale venture with 2-person team, profitable within 6 months

resume.coursework: Investments, Derivatives, Quantitative Asset and Risk Management, Corporate Finance
resume.tools: Excel (advanced), Python, SQL, VBA, PowerBI, Bloomberg Terminal, ChatGPT
resume.skills: Financial Modeling, Valuation Analysis, Portfolio Analysis, Financial Analysis, Multi-stakeholder Coordination
resume.interests: Pharma industry trends, Fintech innovation, Applied AI in finance

cover_letter.subject_line: Finance Rotation Program - Novartis Pharma AG
cover_letter.paragraph_1: Novartis's commitment to discovering new ways to improve people's lives through science-based innovation is inseparable from financial rigor. With $54.5 billion in 2025 sales and a 40.1% core operating margin, Novartis demonstrates that disciplined financial management and breakthrough innovation can coexist. The Finance Rotation Program's structured approach to developing analysts across accounting, financial reporting, and business planning offers the ideal foundation to contribute meaningfully to Novartis's 30+ pipeline assets and advance your mission to change the practice of medicine.
cover_letter.paragraph_2: Over two years as an analyst in a Geneva-based financial advisory boutique, I have developed analytical expertise through building financial models, executing complex financial analysis, and delivering executive-level insights. My prior FP&A role at Generali's Swiss subsidiary, supporting financial reporting, variance analysis, and budget planning across CHF 50M+ in revenues, provides direct exposure to the operational accounting and business planning functions that the rotation program emphasizes. This combination of analytical depth and hands-on FP&A experience has prepared me to contribute meaningfully across Novartis's finance functions.
cover_letter.paragraph_3: With a Master's degree in Finance from HEC Lausanne, fluency in English, French, Spanish, and German, and international experience across Europe, the US, and Asia, I bring both the quantitative foundation and cross-cultural capability required in Novartis's global environment. My professional journey has reinforced my commitment to working in organizations where finance supports meaningful impact, and Novartis's healthcare mission aligns deeply with my career aspirations.
cover_letter.closing: I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

email.subject: Application - Finance Rotation Program - Adrian Turion
email.body:
Dear Recruitment Team,

Please find attached my resume and cover letter for the Finance Rotation Program position at Novartis Pharma AG.

With a background in financial analysis, FP&A, and cross-functional project coordination, I am excited by the opportunity to deepen my expertise in accounting, reporting, and business planning through your structured 3-year program. I am available to start on September 1, 2026, and committed to contributing to Novartis's mission from day one.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my analytical foundation and professional experience align with the Finance Rotation Program.

Best regards,
Adrian Turion
+41 77 262 37 96
